[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|ja|板倉町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. == Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|ja|足利市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Nogi, Tochigi|ja|野木町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya, Saitama|ja|熊谷市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|ja|豊岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|ja|幸手市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|ja|春日部市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|ja|ときがわ町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|ja|加須市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}.
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located at {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|ja|花園神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shinjuku, Tokyo|ja|新宿区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|ja|伊勢原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}.
== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|ja|田原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}.
== Mie Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}. Considered a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}, though later merged with the Hachioji Shrine.
== Related Articles ==
* {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakaden Shrine|ja|若電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Lightning|ja|落雷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Thunder|ja|雷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=draft}}

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|火雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi, Gunma|ja|前橋市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|ja|桐生市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Isezaki, Gunma|ja|伊勢崎市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|ja|伊勢原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|ja|板倉町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|火雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi, Gunma|ja|前橋市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|ja|桐生市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Isezaki, Gunma|ja|伊勢崎市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|ja|足利市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Nogi, Tochigi|ja|野木町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya, Saitama|ja|熊谷市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|ja|豊岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|ja|幸手市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|ja|春日部市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|ja|ときがわ町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|ja|加須市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located at {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|ja|花園神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Shinjuku, Tokyo|ja|新宿区|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|ja|伊勢原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|ja|田原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Mie Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Considered a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, though later merged with the Hachioji Shrine.
== Related Articles ==

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|ja|板倉町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakura, Gunma|qq=}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|火雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi, Gunma|ja|前橋市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi, Gunma|qq=}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|ja|桐生市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiryū, Gunma|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=}}, {{ill|Isezaki, Gunma|ja|伊勢崎市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezaki, Gunma|qq=}}.
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|qq=}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=}}, {{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|ja|足利市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga, Tochigi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Nogi, Tochigi|ja|野木町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nogi, Tochigi|qq=}}, originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya, Saitama|ja|熊谷市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumagaya, Saitama|qq=}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|ja|豊岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyooka, Hyōgo|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|ja|幸手市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satte, Saitama|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|ja|春日部市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasukabe, Saitama|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama City|qq=}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|ja|ときがわ町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokigawa, Saitama|qq=}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|ja|加須市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazo, Saitama|qq=}}.
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=}} – Located at {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|ja|花園神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanazono Shrine|qq=}} in {{ill|Shinjuku, Tokyo|ja|新宿区|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjuku, Tokyo|qq=}}. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|ja|伊勢原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isehara, Kanagawa|qq=}}, affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibita Shrine|qq=}}.
== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|ja|田原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahara, Aichi|qq=}}.
== Mie Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|ja|伊勢市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise, Mie|qq=}}. Considered a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}, though later merged with the Hachioji Shrine.

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|ja|板倉町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakura, Gunma|qq=}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|火雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi, Gunma|ja|前橋市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi, Gunma|qq=}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|ja|桐生市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiryū, Gunma|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=}}, {{ill|Isezaki, Gunma|ja|伊勢崎市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezaki, Gunma|qq=}}.
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|qq=}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=}}, {{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|ja|足利市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga, Tochigi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Nogi, Tochigi|ja|野木町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nogi, Tochigi|qq=}}, originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya, Saitama|ja|熊谷市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumagaya, Saitama|qq=}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|ja|豊岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyooka, Hyōgo|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|ja|幸手市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satte, Saitama|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|ja|春日部市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasukabe, Saitama|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama City|qq=}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|ja|ときがわ町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokigawa, Saitama|qq=}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|ja|加須市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazo, Saitama|qq=}}.
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=}} – Located at {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|ja|花園神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanazono Shrine|qq=}} in {{ill|Shinjuku, Tokyo|ja|新宿区|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjuku, Tokyo|qq=}}. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==

== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|ja|田原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahara, Aichi|qq=}}.

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|ja|板倉町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakura, Gunma|qq=}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Yakusanoikazuchi|lt=Yakusanoikazuchi|lt=Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|火雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kiryū, Gunma|Kiryū, Gunma]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=}}, [[:en:Isesaki|Isezaki, Gunma]].
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|qq=}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=}} – Located at [[:en:Hanazono Shrine|Hanazono Shrine]] in [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku, Tokyo]]. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Isehara, Kanagawa|Isehara, Kanagawa]], affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibita Shrine|qq=}}.
== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Tahara, Aichi|Tahara, Aichi]].
== Mie Prefecture ==

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kiryū, Gunma|Kiryū, Gunma]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=}}, [[:en:Isesaki|Isezaki, Gunma]].
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|qq=}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=}} – Located at [[:en:Hanazono Shrine|Hanazono Shrine]] in [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku, Tokyo]]. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Isehara, Kanagawa|Isehara, Kanagawa]], affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibita Shrine|qq=}}.
== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Tahara, Aichi|Tahara, Aichi]].
== Mie Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise, Mie]]. Considered a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}, though later merged with the Hachioji Shrine.

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 * {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in * {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].

These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.

== Tokyo ==

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kiryū, Gunma|Kiryū, Gunma]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Isesaki|Isezaki, Gunma]].
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located at [[:en:Hanazono Shrine|Hanazono Shrine]] in [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku, Tokyo]]. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Related Articles ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kiryū, Gunma|Kiryū, Gunma]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Isesaki|Isezaki, Gunma]].
== Tochigi Prefecture ==

The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located at [[:en:Hanazono Shrine|Hanazono Shrine]] in [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku, Tokyo]]. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=|1=Kamishinden, Maebashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28682633}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=|1=Heiwa, Maebashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24860656}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki (Kiryū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kiryū, Gunma|Kiryū, Gunma]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=|1=Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==

Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
