{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|qq=|1=Kamishinden, Maebashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28682633}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|qq=|1=Heiwa, Maebashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24860656}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kiryū, Gunma|Kiryū, Gunma]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Isesaki|Isezaki, Gunma]].
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|qq=|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|qq=|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|qq=|1=Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located at [[:en:Hanazono Shrine|Hanazono Shrine]] in [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku, Tokyo]]. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Kanagawa Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Isehara, Kanagawa|Isehara, Kanagawa]], affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibita Shrine|qq=|1=Hibita Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547364}}.
== Aichi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|ja|雷電神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Tahara)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Tahara, Aichi|Tahara, Aichi]].
== Mie Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Ise)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise, Mie]]. Considered a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, though later merged with the Hachioji Shrine.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|1=Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located at [[:en:Hanazono Shrine|Hanazono Shrine]] in [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku, Tokyo]]. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Itakura, Gunma|Itakura, Gunma]], [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.

Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga, Tochigi]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Nogi, Tochigi|Nogi, Tochigi]], originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in [[:en:Kumagaya|Kumagaya, Saitama]], the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Satte, Saitama|Satte, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasukabe, Saitama|Kasukabe, Saitama]]. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]]. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in [[:en:Tokigawa, Saitama|Tokigawa, Saitama]], atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|1=Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo, Saitama]].

Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s located primarily in the [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against [[:en:Thunder|Thunder]], although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include [[:en:Yakusanoikazuchi|Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami]], {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within [[:en:Maebashi|Maebashi, Gunma]], behind the main hall <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}}s located primarily in the {{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|WD=Q132480|lt=Kantō region}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan}}. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against {{ill|Thunder|en|Thunder|WD=Q83301|lt=Thunder}}, although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|en|Itakura, Gunma|WD=Q1203771|lt=Itakura, Gunma}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Yakusanoikazuchi|en|Yakusanoikazuchi|WD=Q10892534|lt=Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|WD=Q201613|lt=Maebashi, (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Isesaki|en|Isesaki|WD=Q328596|lt=Isezaki, [[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}}s located primarily in the {{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|WD=Q132480|lt=Kantō region}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan}}. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against {{ill|Thunder|en|Thunder|WD=Q83301|lt=Thunder}}, although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|en|Itakura, Gunma|WD=Q1203771|lt=Itakura, Gunma}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Yakusanoikazuchi|en|Yakusanoikazuchi|WD=Q10892534|lt=Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|WD=Q201613|lt=Maebashi, Gunma}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|1=Kamishinden, Maebashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28682633}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|1=Heiwa, Maebashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24860656}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|en|Kiryū, Gunma|WD=Q634022|lt=Kiryū, Gunma}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Isesaki|en|Isesaki|WD=Q328596|lt=Isezaki, == Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya|en|Kumagaya|WD=Q41106|lt=Kumagaya, Saitama}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|WD=Q696388|lt=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|en|Satte, Saitama|WD=Q868971|lt=Satte, Saitama}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|en|Kasukabe, Saitama|WD=Q376023|lt=Kasukabe, Saitama}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, {{ill|Saitama (city)|en|Saitama (city)|WD=Q134635|lt=Saitama City}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|en|Tokigawa, Saitama|WD=Q251027|lt=Tokigawa, Saitama}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|1=Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|en|Kazo, Saitama|WD=Q851680|lt=Kazo, Saitama}}.

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}s located primarily in the {{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|WD=Q132480|lt=Kantō region|1=Kantō region}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against {{ill|Thunder|en|Thunder|WD=Q83301|lt=Thunder|1=Thunder}}, although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|en|Itakura, Gunma|WD=Q1203771|lt=Itakura, Gunma|1=Itakura, Gunma}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Yakusanoikazuchi|en|Yakusanoikazuchi|WD=Q10892534|lt=Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Yakusanoikazuchi}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|WD=Q201613|lt=Maebashi, Gunma|1=Maebashi}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|1=Q28682633|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28682633}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, == Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya|en|Kumagaya|WD=Q41106|lt=Kumagaya, Saitama|1=Kumagaya}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|WD=Q696388|lt=Toyooka, Hyōgo|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|en|Satte, Saitama|WD=Q868971|lt=Satte, Saitama|1=Satte, Saitama}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|en|Kasukabe, Saitama|WD=Q376023|lt=Kasukabe, Saitama|1=Kasukabe, Saitama}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, {{ill|Saitama (city)|en|Saitama (city)|WD=Q134635|lt=Saitama City|1=Saitama (city)}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|en|Tokigawa, Saitama|WD=Q251027|lt=Tokigawa, Saitama|1=Tokigawa, Saitama}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|1=Q11660214|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|en|Kazo, Saitama|WD=Q851680|lt=Kazo, Saitama|1=Kazo, Saitama}}.

[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}s located primarily in the {{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|WD=Q132480|lt=Kantō region|1=Kantō region}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against {{ill|Thunder|en|Thunder|WD=Q83301|lt=Thunder|1=Thunder}}, although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|en|Itakura, Gunma|WD=Q1203771|lt=Itakura, Gunma|1=Itakura, Gunma}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Yakusanoikazuchi|en|Yakusanoikazuchi|WD=Q10892534|lt=Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Yakusanoikazuchi}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and == Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located at {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|en|Hanazono Shrine|WD=Q3126680|lt=Hanazono Shrine|1=Hanazono Shrine}} in {{ill|Shinjuku|en|Shinjuku|WD=Q179645|lt=Shinjuku, Tokyo|1=Shinjuku}}. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|en|Isehara, Kanagawa|WD=Q734520|lt=Isehara, Kanagawa|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}}, affiliated with {{ill|Hibita Shrine|ja|比々多神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibita Shrine|1=Hibita Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547364}}.

* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Ise)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|WD=Q328067|lt=Ise, Mie|1=Ise, Mie}}. Considered a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, though later merged with the Hachioji Shrine.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷電神社]]
[[File:Itakura Raiden Shrine Honsha 1.JPG|thumb|220px|Raiden Shrine (群馬県板倉町)]] '''Raiden Shrine''' (雷電神社) is a name shared by multiple {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}s located primarily in the {{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|WD=Q132480|lt=Kantō region|1=Kantō region}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. These shrines are commonly dedicated to deities associated with protection against {{ill|Thunder|en|Thunder|WD=Q83301|lt=Thunder|1=Thunder}}, although their enshrined deities and origins vary.
Similar shrines include {{ill|Raijin Shrine|ja|雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine|qq=}} and {{ill|Den Shrine|ja|電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Den Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Gunma Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|ja|雷電神社 (板倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Itakura, Gunma|en|Itakura, Gunma|WD=Q1203771|lt=Itakura, Gunma|1=Itakura, Gunma}}, [[Ōra District]], this shrine is also called Itakura Raiden Shrine. It holds an unofficial status as the head shrine of "Raiden Shrines" in the Kantō region. Enshrined deities include {{ill|Yakusanoikazuchi|en|Yakusanoikazuchi|WD=Q10892534|lt=Honoikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Yakusanoikazuchi}}, {{ill|Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|大雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōikazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Minami, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[Minami, Maebashi]] within {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|WD=Q201613|lt=Maebashi, Gunma|1=Maebashi}}, behind the main hall of {{ill|Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja|前橋神明宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maebashi Shinmeigu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市上新田町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kamishinden, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamishinden, Maebashi|ja|上新田町 (前橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamishinden, Maebashi|1=Q28682633|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28682633}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市平和町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Heiwa, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Heiwa, Maebashi|ja|平和町 (前橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa, Maebashi|1=Q24860656|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24860656}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市横沢町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Yokosawa, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Yokosawa, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja|雷電神社 (前橋市田口町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Taguchi, Maebashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in Taguchi, Maebashi. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|雷電神社 (桐生市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kiryū)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|en|Kiryū, Gunma|WD=Q634022|lt=Kiryū, Gunma|1=Kiryū, Gunma}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|ja|雷電神社 (伊勢崎市境伊与久)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Isezaki, Sakae-Iyoku)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Sakae, Iyoku|ja|境伊与久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae, Iyoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Isesaki|en|Isesaki|WD=Q328596|lt=Isezaki, Gunma|1=Isesaki}}.
== Tochigi Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市平出町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hiraide, Utsunomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja|平出町 (宇都宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiraide, Utsunomiya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, this shrine is also called Hiraide Raiden Shrine. The shrine enshrines {{ill|Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja|別雷之大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakazuchi-no-Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and nine other deities. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja|雷電神社 (宇都宮市細谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Hosoya, Utsunomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja|細谷町 (宇都宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoya, Utsunomiya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja|雷電神社 (足利市助戸東山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Sukedo, Ashikaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja|助戸東山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukedo, Ashikaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|en|Ashikaga, Tochigi|WD=Q374477|lt=Ashikaga, Tochigi|1=Ashikaga, Tochigi}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja|雷電神社 (野木町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Nogi, Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Nogi, Tochigi|en|Nogi, Tochigi|WD=Q1203180|lt=Nogi, Tochigi|1=Nogi, Tochigi}}, originally part of {{ill|Yanaka Village|ja|谷中村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaka Village|1=Yanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632602}}.
== Saitama Prefecture ==
* {{ill|Kaminomura Shrine|ja|上之村神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminomura Shrine|qq=}} (Daiden Shrine) – Located in {{ill|Kumagaya|en|Kumagaya|WD=Q41106|lt=Kumagaya, Saitama|1=Kumagaya}}, the shrine dates back 1,000 years and is associated with the {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|lt=Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Hyōgo)|qq=}} in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|WD=Q696388|lt=Toyooka, Hyōgo|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Satte)|ja|雷電神社 (幸手市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Satte)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Satte, Saitama|en|Satte, Saitama|WD=Q868971|lt=Satte, Saitama|1=Satte, Saitama}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja|雷電神社 (春日部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kasukabe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kasukabe, Saitama|en|Kasukabe, Saitama|WD=Q376023|lt=Kasukabe, Saitama|1=Kasukabe, Saitama}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|ja|雷電神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Saitama City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Imawa, Kita-ku|ja|今羽町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imawa, Kita-ku|1=Kombachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17223316}}, {{ill|Saitama (city)|en|Saitama (city)|WD=Q134635|lt=Saitama City|1=Saitama (city)}}. * Raiden Shrine (Tokigawa) – Located in {{ill|Tokigawa, Saitama|en|Tokigawa, Saitama|WD=Q251027|lt=Tokigawa, Saitama|1=Tokigawa, Saitama}}, atop {{ill|Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|ja|雷電山 (埼玉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Mountain (Saitama)|1=Q11660214|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660214}}. * {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|ja|雷電神社 (加須市南大桑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Kazo)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kazo, Saitama|en|Kazo, Saitama|WD=Q851680|lt=Kazo, Saitama|1=Kazo, Saitama}}.
== Tokyo ==
* {{ill|Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|雷電神社 (新宿区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located at {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|en|Hanazono Shrine|WD=Q3126680|lt=Hanazono Shrine|1=Hanazono Shrine}} in {{ill|Shinjuku|en|Shinjuku|WD=Q179645|lt=Shinjuku, Tokyo|1=Shinjuku}}. Merged with Hanazono Shrine in 1928 but still maintains its presence as {{ill|Raiden Inari Shrine|ja|雷電稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
